message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #000000
skinparam interfaceFontColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeIBackgroundColor #D8BFD8
skinparam stereotypeIBorderColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeIFontColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor #000000

class "Personnage" as Personnage {
    void combattre()
    void setArme(ComportementArme)
}

class "Aventure" as Aventure {
    void main(String)
}

class "Troll" as Troll
class "Roi" as Roi
class "Reine" as Reine
class "Chevalier" as Chevalier

interface "ComportementArme" as ComportementArme {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "ComportementPoignard" as ComportementPoignard {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "ComportementEpee" as ComportementEpee {
    void utiliserArme()
}

class "ComportementArc" as ComportementArc {
    void utiliserArme()
}

Personnage <|-- Troll
Personnage <|-- Roi
Personnage <|-- Reine
Personnage <|-- Chevalier
Personnage --> "1" ComportementArme

ComportementArme <|.. ComportementPoignard
ComportementArme <|.. ComportementEpee
ComportementArme <|.. ComportementArc

@enduml
